title: Henophyton deserti
taxonomy: Henophyton deserti is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Chenopodiaceae. It belongs to the genus Henophyton, which is part of the order Caryophyllales. The plant is further classified under the family level as being a member of the family Chenopodiaceae, which has been reclassified into Amaranthaceae. This classification is based on the plant's characteristics and its evolutionary relationships with other plants. Henophyton deserti's classification reflects its unique characteristics as a desert-dwelling species.
